bug_clusters.name: Localization
bug_clusters.repro_notes: A Letter to the Development Team I was delighted to be invited to participate in this playtest. In my opinion, 《Vacation Cafe Simulator》 is already a fairly polished and enjoyable game. Unlike other simulator games, this one leans more towa

bug_clusters.name: Steam Deck cursor/input
bug_clusters.repro_notes: Cursor disappears in menu and mid-recipe on Steam Deck; cleaning hold interaction inconsistent.

bug_clusters.name: Co-op task sync
bug_clusters.repro_notes: Level 7 shared objectives do not sync if non-host buys furniture; checklist remains blocked.

bug_clusters.name: Recipe authenticity
bug_clusters.repro_notes: Players flag non-authentic ingredients (e.g., milk in pizza dough) as immersion-breakers.

bug_clusters.name: Customer flow stall
bug_clusters.repro_notes: After level 6-8, the cafe can stay open in daylight with no clients arriving for 10-20+ minutes, even after restart.

bug_clusters.name: Shutdown hang
bug_clusters.repro_notes: Closing the game leaves Steam stuck on "stopping", blocking relaunch until full system restart.

bug_clusters.name: Object placement lock
bug_clusters.repro_notes: Prepared items cannot be placed back onto counters or other surfaces; soft-lock resolves only after waiting or random reset.

feedback_signals.quote: Players like the small Italian village vibe and relaxing loop, but still describe the demo as janky and in need of interaction polish.
Players ask for an optional patience bar or timer so challenge level can be tuned without breaking the cozy mode.
Prep friction: players want to batch-cut ingredients, store them in the fridge, and serve prepared dishes later without constant backtracking.
Store exploit report: players can walk away with food in the basket without paying.
Multiple requests ask for deliveries, scooters, and gameplay beyond the village to add co-op challenge and world fantasy.
Simulation realism request: optional spoilage, order mistakes, and actual money loss would add restaurant stakes missing in the demo.
Players with smaller PCs and even some strong rigs still ask for optimization and better FPS consistency.
Multiplayer sessions in the demo do not save reliably, which needs explicit messaging and a release-ready save path.
Inventory QoL request: players want hotbar reordering and a trash can for extra cut ingredients that waste slots.
Level 6 report: no new clients enter the cafe even though it is open and daylight, blocking further progress.
Mods confirm repeated reports that levels 7-8 can go 15-20 minutes or longer with no customers, even when the cafe remains open.
Close-game issue: the app appears closed, but Steam stays on stopping and players cannot relaunch until reboot.
Item placement lock: prepared food and drinks cannot be put back on counters or anywhere else, creating a prep soft-lock.
Steam Deck players report the pizza cursor is nearly invisible in menus and mini-games until they learn to track a faint outline.
Linux workaround: Proton Experimental often loses the cursor, Proton 10.x restores it, and Alt+Tab can temporarily mitigate the issue.
Video repro shows the cursor bug reliably appears after using the cutting table, leaving only tiny white cursor artifacts.
Positive demand signal: players ask to keep the demo open longer, call it therapeutic, and report 8-hour co-op sessions.
Steam Deck report: pizza cursor disappears in menu and mid-recipe; issue persists with docked keyboard + mouse.
Left click mop interaction feels one-second long and does not hold consistently while cleaning stains.
In co-op level 7, when another player buys furniture, checklist task remains unresolved for host.
Wall clock appears static and does not track in-game time.
Players ask for end-of-day cutoff with daily ledger (gains/losses) to improve pacing and progression clarity.
Economy feels too fail-safe; players want order mistakes to affect tips and reviews.
Patio customer volume appears not to scale with party size in co-op sessions.
Recipe authenticity feedback: milk in pizza dough breaks immersion for core cooking audience.
Players still report occasional lag despite overall positive cozy impression.
FAQ signal: demo progress will not carry over to full release, needs explicit onboarding communication.
Co-op expectation signal: current launch target is host +3 (4 total), community asks about future expansion.
Positive sentiment: players describe demo as therapeutic, satisfying, and are asking to keep demo available longer.

actions.solution: Save Guardrail System: autosave + manual slot + recovery snapshot.
Reconnect flow + fallback resync + network diagnostics.
actions.kpi: -50% co-op bug reports; +15% co-op sessions >30 min

actions.solution: Dynamic quality profile + split graphics controls.
Hold-to-chop + input comfort + sign-text fix.
Inventory relief and return-to-storage QoL.
Dishwashing automation unlock at Level 4.
Pizza Oven milestone at Level 7.
Barista notebook for pinned preferences.
VIP zoning with smart zone detection.
Steam Deck input reliability pass: cursor persistence, UI focus guardrails, hold-to-clean behavior parity.
actions.kpi: -40% Steam Deck input complaints; +successful first-session completion

actions.solution: Co-op objective state sync patch for shared purchases and checklist clearing logic.
End-of-day cycle + daily ledger prototype (income, expenses, service quality).
Recipe authenticity pass for core Italian dishes + visual consistency in recipe book.
Add customer-spawn watchdog, open-state telemetry, and fallback spawn recovery for level 6-8 stalls.
actions.kpi: -80% no-client stall reports after level 6; +completed demo runs

actions.solution: Graceful shutdown pass: close Steam hooks cleanly, clear overlays, and add exit-state logging for stuck stopping cases.
Recovery path for held items: reset invalid placement state, rebind counters, and surface a safe drop fallback.
Validate checkout state and lock inventory exit when basket contents are unpaid.
Difficulty preset with optional customer patience timer and visible service-pressure toggle.
actions.kpi: +challenge satisfaction in surveys without hurting cozy segment

actions.solution: Prep/storage QoL pack: hotbar reorder, trash can, prep bins, and clearer surface storage behavior.
Prototype optional spoilage, order-failure penalties, and daily stakes to make restaurant mastery meaningful.
Prototype food deliveries with scooter routing and multi-order carrying to expand the co-op fantasy beyond the patio.
actions.kpi: +wishlist intent and world-expansion sentiment in surveys

improvements.solution: Save Guardrail System: autosave, manual slot, recovery snapshot.
Input Comfort Bundle: hold-to-action, inventory reorder, sign-text fix.
Reconnect flow, fallback resync, diagnostics UI.
Weekly resort loop: mini-events + goals board.

insights_shipping.title: Hold-to-chop / Long-press input
insights_shipping.solution: Reduce repetitive clicking by hold action with progress.

insights_shipping.title: Inventory wall fix
insights_shipping.solution: Expand inventory or allow prep in place.

insights_shipping.title: Dishwashing automation
insights_shipping.solution: Unlock dishwashing helper role at level 4.

insights_shipping.title: Steam Deck input reliability
insights_shipping.solution: Fix disappearing cursor + persistent hold interactions for cleaning and recipe flow.

insights_shipping.title: Co-op objective synchronization
insights_shipping.solution: Repair shared to-do progression when teammate actions should clear host checklist.

insights_shipping.title: Customer spawn watchdog
insights_shipping.solution: Add a watchdog for open-state stalls so customer flow self-recovers before the session becomes unwinnable.

insights_shipping.title: Item placement recovery path
insights_shipping.solution: Detect invalid held-item states and offer a safe drop/reset path instead of trapping the player in prep flow.

insights_shipping.title: Graceful shutdown integrity
insights_shipping.solution: Close the game cleanly in Steam and remove residual overlay state so players can relaunch without rebooting.

insights_hypothesis.title: VIP zoning
insights_hypothesis.solution: Smart zone detection and guest type assignment.

insights_hypothesis.title: End-of-day cadence + ledger
insights_hypothesis.solution: Introduce daily closure ritual and summary screen to strengthen loop clarity and stakes.

insights_hypothesis.title: Recipe authenticity pass
insights_hypothesis.solution: Align iconic recipes with expected culinary logic and reduce immersion-breaking ingredients.

insights_hypothesis.title: Simulation stakes mode
insights_hypothesis.solution: Offer an optional realism mode with spoilage and mistake penalties for players who want restaurant stakes.

insights_hypothesis.title: Delivery loop prototype
insights_hypothesis.solution: Test whether deliveries, scooter traversal, and multi-order carrying deepen co-op novelty without collapsing pacing.

insights_hypothesis.title: Patience timer option
insights_hypothesis.solution: Validate whether an optional patience bar increases mastery appeal while preserving the cozy default mode.
